brandStyle: Professional luxury cosmetic product photography for a premium kids beauty brand. Pastel sky blue (#C9E4F5) and baby pink (#FBD3DE) soft gradient background, crystal white highlights, dreamy soft studio lighting, tiny sparkles and delicate bubbles floating in the air, product floating weightlessly, glossy reflective surfaces, minimalist rounded packaging with a small elegant 'LeoNes' wordmark, Apple-level minimalism, Rhode-style premium product presentation, photorealistic, high-end beauty campaign, no people, no text overlays except the LeoNes logo on packaging
videoStyle: Viral TikTok-style product video for kids, 8 seconds, designed to loop perfectly. Video starts INSTANTLY mid-action with a visual surprise in the first second, no slow intro, no fade-in. The product behaves like a cheerful little character with personality, snappy comedic timing, one escalating gag, and a punchline in the final second that loops seamlessly back to the start. Pastel blue and pink dreamy backdrop, sparkles and confetti pops, wholesome kid-friendly humor, premium production quality, satisfying ASMR-adjacent motion, no people, no on-screen text

products.name: LeoNes pH Gloss Clear
products.subject: a crystal-clear lip gloss in a frosted rounded tube with a soft cloud-shaped white cap; the clear gloss shows a gentle bloom of soft pink swirling inside, hinting it magically turns pink on lips
products.motion: INSTANT HOOK: video opens with the gloss tube already mid-shake, vibrating comically. The pink swirl inside suddenly EXPLODES into bloom like a magic trick, filling the whole tube with swirling pink. The tube freezes, tilts smugly at the camera, and one wink-like sparkle pings off its cap — ending in the exact shaking pose it started in so the video loops forever
products.ecom: A standard cylindrical clear lip gloss tube (10 ml) with doe-foot wand applicator, crystal-clear gloss visible inside with the faintest pink tint at the bottom, frosted transparent body, pastel sky blue cylindrical cap. White minimal label printed directly on tube: "LeoNes" wordmark, product name "pH GLOSS", small line "clear to pink · 10 ml".
products.swatch: a crystal-clear lip gloss smear that fades into a soft baby pink at one end, glassy wet shine

products.name: LeoNes Crystal Lip Oil
products.subject: a luxurious clear lip oil in a faceted crystal-look rounded bottle with a pastel blue cap, light refracting through the oil like a prism, one suspended droplet of oil glistening beside it
products.motion: INSTANT HOOK: video opens with the crystal bottle already mid-air falling toward a fluffy cloud. It lands and BOINGS impossibly high, spinning with prism rainbows flashing everywhere, bounces three times higher each time, then a golden oil droplet lands on its cap like a tiny crown and it freezes in a royal pose — then tips backward off the cloud to restart the fall, perfect loop
products.ecom: A small clear glass lip oil bottle (8 ml) with rounded square shoulders like premium lip oil packaging, filled with transparent oil, wand applicator inside, pastel sky blue cap. Clean white front label: "LeoNes" wordmark, "CRYSTAL LIP OIL", small line "nourishing shine · 8 ml".
products.swatch: a transparent lip oil smear, ultra-glassy and fluid with tiny light refractions

products.name: LeoNes Glitter Gloss
products.subject: a lip gloss tube filled with fine holographic glitter suspended in clear pink gloss, glitter catching the light like tiny stars, rounded white cap with a tiny gold star charm
products.motion: INSTANT HOOK: video opens on an extreme close-up of holographic glitter already swirling violently inside the gloss like a glitter tornado. Camera snaps back to reveal the tube shaking itself like a maraca at a party, glitter storm raging inside, then it stops DEAD and every piece of glitter freezes mid-swirl in perfect sparkle formation — one beat of smug stillness, then one tiny shake restarts the tornado, perfect loop
products.ecom: A standard cylindrical clear lip gloss tube (10 ml) filled with soft pink gloss containing fine cosmetic-grade shimmer evenly suspended in the formula, frosted transparent body, pastel sky blue cap. White label: "LeoNes" wordmark, "GLITTER GLOSS", small line "holographic shine · 10 ml".
products.swatch: a soft pink gloss smear packed with fine holographic shimmer particles catching rainbow light

products.name: LeoNes Color Shift Gloss
products.subject: an iridescent duochrome lip gloss shifting between pastel blue and baby pink depending on the angle, in a rounded pebble-shaped tube, soap-bubble-like color shifts on its surface
products.motion: INSTANT HOOK: video opens with the gloss mid-pirouette already changing color, blue-pink-blue-pink strobing faster and faster like it cannot decide. It spins so fast it becomes a pastel blur, then SLAMS to a stop landing in a ta-da pose as half blue half pink exactly down the middle, sparkles burst, then it starts spinning again, perfect loop
products.ecom: A standard cylindrical clear lip gloss tube (10 ml) filled with pearlescent duochrome gloss shifting softly between light pink and light blue like real pearl pigment, frosted transparent body, pastel sky blue cap. White label: "LeoNes" wordmark, "COLOR SHIFT", small line "pink-blue pearl · 10 ml".
products.swatch: a pearlescent duochrome gloss smear shifting between light blue and light pink pearl

products.name: LeoNes Lip Sleeping Mask
products.subject: a small rounded jar of whipped cloud-like lip sleeping mask, fluffy white-pink texture visible under a half-open pastel blue lid, tiny crescent moon and star details, resting on a soft cloud
products.motion: INSTANT HOOK: video opens with the jar lid mid-yawn, opening like a giant sleepy eye. The jar wobbles drowsily, leans over further and further in slow motion until it is about to fully tip over, then BOING it startles awake bouncing upright as stars pop around it like an alarm, blinks its lid twice, and starts yawning again, perfect loop
products.ecom: A low round frosted-glass cosmetic jar (20 g) like a premium lip sleeping mask, soft white-pink balm visible through frosted glass, wide pastel sky blue screw lid with "LeoNes" printed on top. Front label: "LeoNes" wordmark, "LIP SLEEPING MASK", small line "overnight care · 20 g".
products.swatch: a whipped white-pink balm swipe with soft matte cloud-like texture and a buttery ridge

products.name: LeoNes Lip Balm SPF
products.subject: a cute rounded lip balm stick with a pastel sky-blue body and sunny golden cap, small sun emblem, standing in bright warm sunlight with a soft blue sky and tiny white clouds behind
products.motion: INSTANT HOOK: video opens with a fluffy white cloud already sliding in front of the sunbathing lip balm like a photobomber. The balm hops up and down indignantly, the embarrassed cloud scurries away, the tiny sun returns and beams a golden spotlight on the balm which strikes a sunglasses-cool pose, then another cloud starts creeping in from the other side, perfect loop
products.ecom: A classic lip balm stick (4.5 g) with a smooth matte white cylindrical body and pastel sky blue cap, standard chapstick proportions. Wrap label: "LeoNes" wordmark, "LIP BALM", small line "SPF 30 · 4.5 g".
products.swatch: a smooth cream balm swipe, soft white with a satin sheen

products.name: LeoNes Lip Scrub
products.subject: a small glass jar of pink sugar lip scrub, sparkling sugar crystals like tiny diamonds spilling artfully beside the jar, rounded white lid, macro-level crystal detail
products.motion: INSTANT HOOK: video opens with sugar crystals already raining down like a confetti storm in slow motion. The little jar slides in from the side doing a happy shimmy dance, bouncing to an imaginary beat as crystals bounce off its lid like popcorn, builds to a final big bounce that launches all the sugar back up into the air, perfect loop
products.ecom: A small clear glass cosmetic jar (15 g) showing real pink sugar scrub texture inside, pastel sky blue screw lid. Front label: "LeoNes" wordmark, "LIP SCRUB", small line "sugar polish · 15 g".
products.swatch: a pink sugar scrub smear with visible fine sugar crystals sparkling in the texture

products.name: LeoNes Jelly Lip Mask
products.subject: a translucent bouncy pink jelly lip mask in a clear rounded pot, the jelly wobbling and glossy like a dessert, light passing through it with a soft glow, tiny bubbles trapped inside the jelly
products.motion: INSTANT HOOK: video opens with the pink jelly already mid-bounce stretched to a comically tall wobble. It wobbles in exaggerated slow motion, each bounce squishier and higher, until it leaps directly at the camera and BOOPS the lens with a squishy jiggle that shakes the whole frame, slides down slowly, and plops back into its pot to bounce again, perfect loop
products.ecom: A clear cosmetic jar (20 g) with translucent bouncy pink jelly balm visible through the glass, realistic jelly texture with tiny air bubbles in the formula, pastel sky blue screw lid. Front label: "LeoNes" wordmark, "JELLY LIP MASK", small line "10-minute glow · 20 g".
products.swatch: a translucent bouncy pink jelly dollop with tiny air bubbles inside, jiggly glossy surface

products.name: LeoNes Duo Gloss
products.subject: a double-ended lip gloss with one end pastel pink and the other end shimmering pearl blue, elegant rounded tube floating horizontally, both caps slightly apart revealing the two shades
products.motion: INSTANT HOOK: video opens with both ends of the duo gloss already spinning furiously in opposite directions like an argument. They tug away from each other in a dramatic standoff, pause one beat, then SNAP together in perfect sync with a satisfying click as pink and blue sparkles explode like a friendship high-five, hold one proud beat, then start spinning apart again, perfect loop
products.ecom: A double-ended cylindrical lip gloss tube (2 x 5 ml), a real dual-wand format: one chamber soft pink gloss, other chamber pearl-white gloss with blue shimmer, frosted clear body, identical pastel sky blue caps on both ends. Center band label: "LeoNes" wordmark, "DUO GLOSS", small line "2 shades · 2x5 ml".
products.swatch: two parallel gloss smears side by side, one soft pink and one pearl white-blue shimmer

products.name: LeoNes Roller Gloss
products.subject: a rollerball lip gloss bottle with a glass sphere applicator tip, clear pink gloss inside, the roller ball glistening like a pearl, rounded pastel blue base
products.motion: INSTANT HOOK: video opens with the rollerball bottle already zooming across the frame like a race car on its pearl ball tip, leaving a shimmer trail. It SCREECHES to a cartoon stop, teeters dramatically on the edge of tipping over, wobbles once, twice, rights itself with a proud little hop, then zooms off again, perfect loop
products.ecom: A glass roll-on lip gloss bottle (10 ml) with a smooth glass rollerball applicator tip, clear light-pink gloss inside, standard roller bottle proportions, pastel sky blue cap. Front label: "LeoNes" wordmark, "ROLLER GLOSS", small line "glide-on shine · 10 ml".
products.swatch: a light pink fluid gloss smear with a rolled glossy edge, fresh and watery

ecomStyle: Realistic commercial e-commerce product photography of a real manufacturable cosmetic product, shot like Rhode, Laneige and Summer Fridays product pages. Front-facing product perfectly centered, eye-level camera, 85mm lens look, pure seamless white studio background, large softbox lighting from upper front-left, gentle fill light, one soft natural contact shadow under the product, crisp focus, true-to-life materials and proportions, standard cosmetic packaging formats, factory-producible design. Brand identity: transparent or frosted-clear packaging body, one consistent pastel sky blue (#C9E4F5) cap or lid on every product, minimalist white label with dark plum (#3A2E3D) modern sans-serif text, the brand wordmark "LeoNes" printed cleanly and legibly. Young, fun, giftable for girls 8-13 but elegant and dermatologically credible for parents: soft, premium, safe-looking, not babyish, not adult.
ecomNegative: Avoid completely: cartoon look, toy-like proportions, cloud-shaped or novelty caps, mascot characters, floating products, sparkles in the air, glitter dust, bubbles, dreamy gradient backgrounds, busy props, extra objects, fantasy shapes, distorted or melted geometry, impossible packaging, oversized caps, gibberish text, misspelled words, watermark, 3D render plastic look, pink background
swatchStyle: Extreme macro commercial beauty photography of a single cosmetic texture smear swatch on a pure seamless white background, thick glossy product smear with realistic light reflections, crisp focus, premium skincare campaign style, no packaging, no props, no text, no people
mascotStyle: Viral cosmetic product mascot advertisement, premium toy-like look. The product is a cute living character with a small adorable face and, when awake, tiny stubby arms and legs. Same product design throughout, shape never changes, same soft pastel glossy pink-blue studio background, same soft dreamy lighting. Slow, smooth, cinematic camera movement. Clean, glossy, pastel, premium, funny, adorable. No extra objects, no other products, no text, no people, not chaotic, not scary, not cheap-looking
mascotClips: Clip 1 of 3, the wake-up: the product stands perfectly still like a normal cosmetic product, then gives one slow cute blink, soft light shine sweeps across its glossy surface while the camera pushes in very slowly; halfway through it wakes up fully, smiles warmly, tiny stubby arms and legs appear, and it does one small playful bounce

Clip 2 of 3, the party: continuing the exact same scene, the cap pops off with a satisfying fluffy cotton-cloud effect and soft pink confetti begins to fall gently; the product dances and flexes confidently with funny cute facial expressions, pure "I know I am cute" energy, confetti drifting softly in slow motion

Clip 3 of 3, the beauty finale: continuing the exact same scene, slow macro beauty close-ups of the glossy texture, the cap and the label area with elegant light sweeps; then the camera pulls back to a perfectly centered final hero pose, the product smiles proudly, one sparkle pings, clean empty space above the product for a logo
